global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo at the top, a central abstract design, and clear messaging at the bottom.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with NovaPay.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.description: A simple outline of a circle and a square, placed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: confidence message
elements.description: Bold, modern font displaying the text 'Save with confidence Built for peace of mind' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo 'NovaPay' is displayed at the top in a clean, prominent font.

elements.label: reward claim
elements.description: A call-to-action button with the text 'Claim reward' in a clear, inviting font at the bottom.
